nodes.label: AI as data analysis and insight generator
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help analyze the production numbers and other KPI of my subordinates

nodes.label: AI as future defect-checking tool
nodes.grounding_span: I will double-check new processes using AI to identify any obvious flaws

nodes.label: AI as proactive team member
nodes.grounding_span: I also use it to create trivia and fun facts for daily standups

nodes.label: Approved AI use with demonstrated impact
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI where it has been approved with my bosses because I can show the impact

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: it would give me about an hour each week of my time for other things

nodes.label: AI for standardized tracking and transparency
nodes.grounding_span: Now the whole warehouse uses those spreadsheets

nodes.label: AI supplementing human leadership skills
nodes.grounding_span: the AI can help supplement my workflow

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: showing big time savings helps with presenting it to my bosses

nodes.label: Informed and supportive leadership
nodes.grounding_span: It helps me be a better leader with the check ins

nodes.label: Organizational buy-in and standardization
nodes.grounding_span: Now the whole warehouse uses those spreadsheets

nodes.label: Focus on human-centric aspects of work
nodes.grounding_span: I can focus on the people

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: This has made all shifts more aware of what is going on with their teams

nodes.label: Frustration with AI limitations
nodes.grounding_span: I have not been allowed to automate tasks in several areas that I believe would make my workload easier

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully I can keep pushing new systems into being supplemented with AI

nodes.label: Strategic documentation and impact tracking
nodes.grounding_span: I document thoroughly as not everyone understands why and how I am doing what I do with the AI

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth questioning
nodes.grounding_span: ask for a more in-depth analysis of anything that seems out of the ordinary
